tooltip.mpmMissing: mpm is not installed or not available in PATH
tooltip.mpmBroken: mpm is installed but failed to execute
tooltip.genericError: The last refresh ended with an error
tooltip.noEnabledManagers: No enabled package managers are currently available

status.mpmMissing: mpm command not found. Install meta-package-manager and ensure `mpm` is in PATH.
status.mpmBroken: mpm is installed but could not be executed.

toast.mpmMissing: mpm command not found. Install meta-package-manager and ensure `mpm` is in PATH.
toast.mpmBroken: mpm is installed but could not be executed.
toast.updatesAvailable: {count} updates available after the latest refresh.
toast.noActiveManagers: No enabled package managers are available for upgrades.
toast.terminalMissing: Set a terminal command in settings before running upgrades.

panel.title: Meta Package Manager Tray
panel.mpmUnavailable: mpm is unavailable on this system right now.
panel.installHint: Install meta-package-manager and ensure the `mpm` command is available in PATH.
panel.genericError: The plugin could not load update data.
panel.noActiveManagers: Enable at least one available package manager in settings.
panel.noUpdates: No updates were reported by the enabled package managers.

header.label: Meta Package Manager Tray
header.description: Choose which managers are monitored, tune the bar appearance, and configure how upgrades launch.

backend.installHint: Install meta-package-manager and keep `mpm` in PATH.

managers.title: Managers
managers.desc: {count} managers selected for refresh and upgrade checks.
managers.unavailable: Detected by mpm but not currently available
managers.noAvailable: No managers are currently available from mpm.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Control the bar icon and colors used for normal and error states.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.desc: Adjust refresh timing, notifications, and the terminal command used for upgrades.

icon.label: Bar icon
icon.desc: Choose the icon shown in the bar widget.

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.desc: Color used for the bar icon in normal state.

showCountText.label: Show update count
showCountText.desc: Display the numeric update count next to the bar icon.

countColor.label: Count color
countColor.desc: Color used for the update count in normal state.

countTextPosition.label: Count position
countTextPosition.desc: Choose whether the count appears before or after the icon.

countTextFontFamily.label: Count font family
countTextFontFamily.desc: Optional font family for the update count. Leave empty to use the shell default.

countTextFontWeight.label: Count font weight
countTextFontWeight.desc: Choose the text weight used for the update count.

countTextScale.label: Count size
countTextScale.desc: Scale the update count relative to the normal bar text size.

errorColor.label: Error color
errorColor.desc: Color used when refreshes fail or managers return errors.

refreshInterval.label: Refresh interval
refreshInterval.desc: How often the plugin checks for updates.

notifications.label: Update notifications
notifications.desc: Notify only when the total update count increases after a successful refresh.

terminal.label: Upgrade terminal command
terminal.desc: Terminal command template used to run `mpm upgrade --all`. Use `{}` as the command placeholder.
